inputs.label: Bit Depth
inputs.businessContext: Number of bits used to represent each sample. Determines dynamic range and number of possible values.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of bits used to represent each sample. Determines dynamic range and number of possible values.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her örneği temsil etmek için kullanılan bit sayısı. Dinamik aralığı ve olası değer sayısını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Bits zur Darstellung jedes Samples. Bestimmt Dynamikumfang und Anzahl möglicher Werte.

inputs.label: Sample Rate
inputs.businessContext: Samples per second. Common values: 44.1 kHz for CD, 48 kHz for video, 96 kHz for high‑res.

businessContext_i18n.en: Samples per second. Common values: 44.1 kHz for CD, 48 kHz for video, 96 kHz for high‑res.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saniyedeki örnek sayısı. Yaygın değerler: CD için 44,1 kHz, video için 48 kHz, yüksek çözünürlük için 96 kHz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Samples pro Sekunde. Übliche Werte: 44,1 kHz für CD, 48 kHz für Video, 96 kHz für High-Res.

inputs.label: Number of Channels
inputs.businessContext: 1 for mono, 2 for stereo, 5.1 for surround, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for mono, 2 for stereo, 5.1 for surround, etc.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für Mono, 2 für Stereo, 5.1 für Surround usw.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the audio stream in seconds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the audio stream in seconds.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
